steps.title: Identify the exponential pattern
steps.content: Each increase of $1$ in $x$ multiplies $y$ by $3$, so the relationship is exponential with base $3$.

steps.title: Use the initial value
steps.content: When $x=0$, $y=200$. In an exponential equation $y=a(3)^x$, the value at $x=0$ is $a(3)^0=a$, so $a=200$.

steps.title: Write and confirm the equation
steps.content: The equation is $$y=200(3)^x.$$ Choices A and C are power functions with $x$ as the base. Choice D has initial value $3$. Choice B matches both the initial value and the multiplier, so B is correct.
